description_long: This is a tall, ornate street light featuring a central pole supporting three lantern-style lamp heads arranged in a triangular formation. The lamp heads are encased in black, metal-framed glass housings with pointed finials on top, evoking a classic Victorian or Edwardian aesthetic. Each lamp head is mounted on a short, decorative arm extending from the central pole, with the central lamp positioned slightly higher than the two flanking lamps. The pole itself is robust and tapers slightly as it rises, with a flared, hexagonal base for stability. Subtle decorative elements, such as small finials and gentle curves, enhance the traditional appearance. The overall finish is a dark, glossy black, giving the street light a stately and elegant presence suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or historic districts.
description: A tall, black, ornate street light with three classic lantern-style lamp heads arranged in a triangular pattern atop a decorative pole. The design is traditional and elegant, with glass-paneled lamp housings and a sturdy, flared base.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three lantern heads, with the central lamp slightly elevated and the two side lamps symmetrically flanking it.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth between the central and side lamps, and the decorative arms supporting each lamp head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the triangular arrangement of the lamp heads and the symmetry of the supporting arms.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the separation and mounting of the lamp heads from a different perspective.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic lantern-style with faceted glass panels, pointed finials, and black metal framing; each head is slightly tapered with decorative trim and a small cap on top.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Subtle decorative bands and finials, with a gently flared and faceted base.
